summary: Phase 7 - Complete Dashboard Verification Testing. All requested features verified: Vendor Dashboard (all 7 sections working, products displayed correctly), Driver Dashboard (Google Maps with markers, status selector, orders with Accept button, history, earnings).
passed_tests: Vendor Dashboard - Tableau de bord section with 4 stats cards
Vendor Dashboard - Mes produits section displays products correctly (1 product found)
Vendor Dashboard - Product shows name, price (15 000 FCFA), and status (Approuvé)
Vendor Dashboard - Add product button navigates to add product form
Vendor Dashboard - Add product form has all required fields (name, description, category, condition, price, stock, images)
Vendor Dashboard - Commandes section loads (empty state shown)
Vendor Dashboard - Suivi livraisons section with Google Map placeholder
Vendor Dashboard - Statistiques section with Ventes and Produits cards
Vendor Dashboard - Abonnement section with subscription plan info
Vendor Dashboard - Paramètres section with shop information form
Driver Dashboard - Carte & Navigation section with Google Maps
Driver Dashboard - Google Maps displays correctly with Abidjan map and red marker
Driver Dashboard - Map legend shows 'Ma position' and 'Client' indicators
Driver Dashboard - Status selector with Disponible/Occupé/Hors ligne buttons
Driver Dashboard - Active order card with 'Récupérer colis' action button
Driver Dashboard - 'Ouvrir dans Google Maps' navigation link present
Driver Dashboard - Commandes section with Accept button for available orders
Driver Dashboard - Historique section shows 5 completed deliveries
Driver Dashboard - Mes gains section with Livraisons and FCFA gagnés stats
Driver Dashboard - Performance section with Note moyenne rating
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: useEffect dependency warnings in VendorDashboard.js and GoogleMap.js (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) - functional but could be cleaned up
Minor: Google Maps shows deprecation warning for google.maps.Marker (recommended to migrate to AdvancedMarkerElement in future)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: TEST_Product_a4dda423 for vendor, TEST_Tracking Test order for driver
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard features verified and working. Vendor Dashboard has 7 sections (Tableau de bord, Mes produits, Commandes, Suivi livraisons, Statistiques, Abonnement, Paramètres). Driver Dashboard has 4 sections (Carte & Navigation, Commandes, Historique, Mes gains) plus status selector. Google Maps component works correctly with API key and displays Abidjan map with markers.

vendor_dashboard.mes_produits: PASS - Products displayed with name, price, status
vendor_dashboard.add_product: PASS - Form with all required fields

driver_dashboard.carte_navigation: PASS - Google Maps with Abidjan map and markers
driver_dashboard.commandes: PASS - Accept button for available orders
driver_dashboard.mes_gains: PASS - Livraisons, FCFA gagnés, Performance stats

google_maps.markers: PASS - Red marker for customer location visible
google_maps.legend: PASS - Ma position and Client indicators
google_maps.navigation_link: PASS - 'Ouvrir dans Google Maps' link present
